plugins.cameraPermission: 2brn uses the camera to scan the pairing QR code shown by your desktop app.

android.extraProguardRules:
# react-native-executorch ships no consumer ProGuard rules and is reached via
# JNI/TurboModules + reflection, so R8 must keep BOTH its RN binding layer and the
# executorch Java runtime API (org.pytorch.executorch.*, loaded reflectively from the
# bundled AAR). Verified necessary: without the org.pytorch keep a release build crashes
# at startup with ClassNotFoundException: org.pytorch.executorch.Module.
-keep class com.swmansion.rnexecutorch.** { *; }
-keep class org.pytorch.executorch.** { *; }
-dontwarn org.pytorch.executorch.**
